property.name: indicesJson
property.description-key: List of indices with formula text

property.name: DefaultValue
property.description-key: Fallback value used when the row current-year value is empty

property.name: GapPercentThreshold
property.description-key: Maximum allowed percent gap between previous and current value before justification is required

property.name: ShowValidation
property.description-key: When true, display required message under empty editable value fields

property.name: OutputData
property.description-key: All rows with current values and selected units as JSON

property.name: HasValidationError
property.description-key: True when at least one editable row has an empty Value field

property.name: ValidationErrorRows
property.description-key: JSON list of rows that have empty required Value fields

property.name: ShowCommentPopup
property.description-key: Toggle output raised when comment icon is clicked

property.name: CommentPopupData
property.description-key: JSON payload with row code and timestamp for popup handling

property.name: ValidationStatusSummary
property.description-key: Formatted summary: Value is required X | Justification required Y
